en: This loss is a burden that we both share Two sinners can atone from a lone prayer
ko: 이 상실은 우리 둘 다 나누는 짐이야.

en: Souls tied intertwined by pride and guilt
There's darkness in the distance From the way that I've been living
But I know I can't resist it
ko: 하지만 거부할 수 없다는 걸 알아.

en: Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time You and I drink the poison from the same vine
Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time Hiding all of our sins from the daylight
From the daylight, running from the daylight From the daylight, running from the daylight
Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time
